baseline_definitions.expanding_climatology: constant = mean(yrfi) over all rows with season <= train_through (the fold training set). DESIGNATED PRIMARY BASELINE.

nrfi_core_v1_comparator.common_row_join_policy: no paired join; V1 is reported as an UNPAIRED aggregate reference using V1's own committed pooled fold metrics (log_loss/brier) side-by-side with V2.2, purely diagnostic
nrfi_core_v1_comparator.role: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY; NOT the promotion baseline; NOT in the multiplicity family
nrfi_core_v1_comparator.row_key: NONE AVAILABLE - V1 predictions expose p_yrfi/p_nrfi + event_id but NOT game_pk, so a deterministic paired row join with the V2.2 admissible matrix is not possible

baseline_definitions.pooled_climatology: constant = mean(yrfi) over ALL training rows with season <= train_through (equal weight per game). Under leakage-free walk-forward this equals expanding_climatology; both are reported.
baseline_definitions.prior_season_climatology: constant = mean(yrfi) over rows with season == train_through (i.e. predict_year - 1).

beta_calibration_spec.deterministic_failure_behavior: if min OOF rows/classes unmet or fit raises -> calibration_unavailable (raw preds, labeled calibration_unavailable=true, still counted in the family)
beta_calibration_spec.parameterization: Kull et al. 2-parameter beta calibration: fit sklearn LogisticRegression(C=1e6, solver=lbfgs, max_iter=1000) on design [ln(clip(p)), -ln(clip(1-p))]; map via the fitted logistic

categorical_encoding.deterministic_column_ordering: all design columns sorted lexicographically by column name before fitting

doubleheader_code.note: captures doubleheader state; the redundant boolean 'doubleheader' is dropped

categorical_encoding.missingness_indicators: every numeric feature also emits a companion {col}__missing = 1.0 when NaN; categorical missingness is the __unknown column
categorical_encoding.policy: explicit one-hot with a frozen vocabulary + an explicit unknown indicator; NO reference-category drop (rely on L2 / LightGBM); strings never passed as ordinary numerics
categorical_encoding.unknown_policy: value missing / None / not-in-vocab -> the __unknown (or __ge3) column = 1.0 and all category columns = 0.0
categorical_encoding.unseen_category_failure_behavior: vocabulary is frozen and complete for the 2015-2024 domain; an unseen category routes deterministically to __unknown (never errors at scoring). A manifest validation test asserts observed categories are a subset of the frozen vocab so any unseen category is caught in validation, not silently absorbed.

deterministic_column_ordering: lexicographic by final column name across the entire design (numeric + one-hot + missingness)

isotonic_spec.calibration_unavailable_behavior: the variant reports raw predictions but is LABELED calibration_unavailable=true and is NOT labeled calibrated; it still counts in the multiplicity family denominator
isotonic_spec.failure_behavior: if min OOF rows/classes unmet or fit raises -> variant marked calibration_unavailable

multiplicity_family.comparator_for_family: expanding_climatology (designated primary baseline), paired on identical admissible-eligible rows
multiplicity_family.derivation: 7 ablations x 3 models x 4 probability treatments (raw, sigmoid, isotonic, beta) = 84

pre_evaluation_status: PREDICTIVE SKILL NOT ESTABLISHED means skill has NOT YET been demonstrated; the V2.2 result is NOT known before execution.

explicit_handling.corrected_completion_timestamps: use the corrected label_available_at if <= cutoff, else exclude
explicit_handling.doubleheaders: ordered by (official_date, game_number); same-day prior game admitted only if its label_available_at <= cutoff
explicit_handling.ended_after_midnight: official_date + label_available_at both retained; availability keyed on label_available_at
explicit_handling.neutral_or_relocated: venue taken from the game's venue_id; travel computed from that venue
explicit_handling.suspended_resumed: use label_available_at of the resumption; if unavailable before cutoff the prior game is excluded

prior_game_availability_rule.prior_game_information_available_at: the prior game's label_available_at (from time_semantics) - the earliest time its completion/venue/outcome was knowable
prior_game_availability_rule.requirement: every schedule/travel feature derived from a prior game must satisfy prior_game_information_available_at <= current_prediction_cutoff

purpose: Resolve every remaining IMPLEMENTATION ambiguity WITHOUT changing the frozen scientific design. Content-addressed and predeclared before computing V2.2 features or results.

spline_gam_spec.boundary_knots: training-fold min and max; inputs are clipped to [min, max] before basis evaluation
spline_gam_spec.columns_receiving_splines: continuous columns only (> 2 unique values in the training fold)
spline_gam_spec.constant_column_handling: columns with <= 1 unique training value dropped from the design
spline_gam_spec.deterministic_column_order: spline bases appended in lexicographic source-column order; within a column, [linear term, then (x-knot)_+^3 for knots in ascending order]
spline_gam_spec.extrapolation_behavior: clip to training range (no cubic extrapolation beyond boundary)
spline_gam_spec.implementation: in-repo (nrfi.core_v2_2_evaluation), numpy truncated-power NATURAL cubic spline basis; NO external spline library (determinism)
spline_gam_spec.knot_construction: training-fold quantiles [0.10, 0.35, 0.65, 0.90], de-duplicated; if < 2 unique knots the column is passed through unsplined
spline_gam_spec.regularization: L2 via the final LogisticRegression C=0.25

timezone_implementation.iana_source: packaged tzdata==2026.3 only (not host zone files)
timezone_implementation.mode: versioned: 'standard_offset' (V2 replay, DEFAULT, preserves V2 identities) and 'iana' (V2.2)
timezone_implementation.path_isolation: force tzdata-only INSIDE the offline build/reproduce process; clear the ZoneInfo cache after configuring the path; NEVER mutate the tz search path at module import; no concurrent build shares mutated process-global tz state
